== Notes for [[Item:Q1180|Q1180]] ==

<p style="text-align: left;" dir="ltr">&nbsp;</p>
<p><div class="mw-heading mw-heading3" style="font-size: 1.2em; font-family: sans-serif; white-space: normal; word-spacing: 0px; text-transform: none; font-weight: bold; padding-bottom: 0px; font-style: normal; padding-top: 0.5em; orphans: 2; widows: 2; margin: 0.25em 0px; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: 1.6; background-color: #ffffff; text-indent: 0px; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;">
<p><h3 id="Honkola,_et_al._(2013)" style="font-family: inherit; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; display: inline; line-height: 1.6; font-stretch: inherit; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; border: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span style="font-size: large;">Honkola, et al. (2013)</span></h3>
<p><span class="mw-editsection" style="font-size: small; font-family: sans-serif; vertical-align: baseline; font-weight: normal; margin-left: 1em; line-height: 0; margin-right: 0px; user-select: none; margin-inline: 1em 0px;"><span class="mw-editsection-bracket" style="margin-right: 0.25em; margin-inline: 0px 0.25em;"><span style="font-size: medium;">[</span></span><a style="text-decoration: none; background: none transparent scroll repeat 0% 0%; white-space: nowrap; border-radius: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word;" title="Edit section: Honkola, et al. (2013)" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Uralic_languages&amp;action=edit&amp;section=10"><span><span style="font-size: medium;">edit</span></span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket" style="margin-left: 0.25em; margin-inline: 0.25em 0px;"><span style="font-size: medium;">]</span></span></span></div>
<p><p style="font-size: 16px; font-family: sans-serif; white-space: normal; word-spacing: 0px; text-transform: none; font-weight: 400; color: #202122; font-style: normal; orphans: 2; widows: 2; margin: 0.5em 0px 1em; letter-spacing: normal; background-color: #ffffff; text-indent: 0px; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;">A<span>&nbsp;</span><a class="mw-redirect" style="text-decoration: none; background: none transparent scroll repeat 0% 0%; border-radius: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word;" title="Computational phylogenetic" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Computational_phylogenetic">computational phylogenetic</a><span>&nbsp;</span>study by Honkola, et al. (2013)<sup id="cite_ref-64" class="reference" style="font-size: 12px; white-space: nowrap; font-weight: normal; font-style: normal; line-height: 1;"><a style="text-decoration: none; background: none transparent scroll repeat 0% 0%; border-radius: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word;" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uralic_languages#cite_note-64"><span class="cite-bracket" style="pointer-events: none;">[</span>64<span class="cite-bracket" style="pointer-events: none;">]</span></a></sup><span>&nbsp;</span>classifies the Uralic languages as follows.<span>&nbsp;</span><a style="text-decoration: none; background: none transparent scroll repeat 0% 0%; border-radius: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word;" title="Molecular clock" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Molecular_clock">Estimated divergence dates</a><span>&nbsp;</span>from Honkola, et al. (2013) are also given.</p>
<p><div class="treeview" style="font-size: 16px; font-family: sans-serif; white-space: normal; word-spacing: 0px; text-transform: none; font-weight: 400; color: #202122; font-style: normal; orphans: 2; widows: 2; letter-spacing: normal; background-color: #ffffff; text-indent: 0px; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;">&nbsp;</div>

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671616233B4F91EFBC0B9822EF79916CA60B
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
